item.title: The Rain is back…
item.description: …So I’ve been dodging raindrops or sneaking rides in between storms. More is coming next week, which will get us near our normal rainfall yearly total...

item.title: Learning More About Meditation and The Default Mode

item.title: Lots of Nice Sunny Days Lately
item.description: We’ve had some really good weather for riding lately, plenty of sun and not too cold. I feel bad because my friends and relatives back East are gettin...

item.title: It’s a Good Idea To Reduce Visceral Fat
item.description: The book Growing Better Not Older by Dr. Sean O’Mara caught my eye, given my interests on this blog. He is an M.D. who in his late 40s was himself sed...

item.title: AI As a Learning Coach
item.description: It’s recommended that us aging adults keep our brains active, so people read and play games like Sudoku. That is a step in the right direction. But I’...
